summary: Tested call history APIs, subscription APIs, and message deletion APIs. All 16 backend tests passed (1 skipped due to invalid test business subcategory). Found and fixed a bug in subscription.tsx where imported getSubscriptionStatus was shadowed by a local function with the same name.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Function name collision - imported getSubscriptionStatus from api.ts was shadowed by local getSubscriptionStatus function
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Renamed import to fetchSubscriptionStatus and updated usage in handleCheckStatus function
bugs_found_and_fixed.impact: handleCheckStatus would fail at runtime when checking subscription status as it would call local function with wrong arguments

call_history_api.GET /api/calls/history: WORKING - Returns array of call records with other_user object and is_outgoing flag
call_history_api.DELETE /api/calls/history/{call_id}: WORKING - Deletes call record, returns 404 for invalid ID, returns 403 for unauthorized user

subscription_plans_api.GET /api/subscriptions/plans: WORKING - Returns monthly/yearly plan IDs, pricing ($9.99/$99.00), 10-day trial
subscription_plans_api.POST /api/subscriptions/create: WORKING - Creates PayPal subscription, requires valid business ownership

message_delete_api.DELETE /api/messages/conversation/{user_: WORKING - Deletes entire conversation, returns deleted_count

frontend_pages.home: WORKING - Home page loads with businesses, artists, stories, create post
frontend_pages.profile: WORKING - Shows user info, business section, friends
frontend_pages.messages: WORKING - Shows conversations list, new message form, call history icon
frontend_pages.subscription: Page loads but shows loading spinner - requires session persistence
frontend_pages.call-history: Page header shows 'Call History' - requires session persistence

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: subscription.tsx had function name collision - local getSubscriptionStatus shadowed imported API function
Console warning: 'Home feed error, falling back to individual calls TypeError: items is not iterable' - shuffle function in home feed may need null check

success_rate.backend: 100% (16 passed, 1 skipped due to test data issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test_call_peer@example.com user for call testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested backend APIs are working correctly. Fixed subscription.tsx function collision bug. Frontend pages load but require session authentication - direct navigation shows loading spinner until session is established. The 'items is not iterable' error in home feed shuffle function should be investigated.

subscription_function_collision.root_cause: In subscription.tsx, a local function named getSubscriptionStatus(business) was defined on line 75, which shadowed the imported getSubscriptionStatus API function from lib/api.ts. When handleCheckStatus() called getSubscriptionStatus(sessionToken, subscription_id), it was actually calling the local function with wrong argument types.
subscription_function_collision.fix: Renamed the import to fetchSubscriptionStatus using 'import { getSubscriptionStatus as fetchSubscriptionStatus }' and updated the call in handleCheckStatus()
